member.name: P:DiffPlex.Chunkers.CharacterChunker.Instance
member.summary: Gets the default singleton instance of the chunker.

member.summary: Gets the default singleton instance of the chunker.

member.summary: Gets the default singleton instance of the chunker.

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Chunkers.WordChunker.Instance
member.summary: Gets the default singleton instance of the chunker.

member.name: P:DiffPlex.DiffBuilder.InlineDiffBuilder.Instance
member.summary: Gets the default singleton instance of the inline diff builder.

member.summary: Gets the inline textual diffs.
member.param: if ignore the white space; otherwise, .

member.name: M:DiffPlex.DiffBuilder.InlineDiffBuilder.Diff(DiffPlex.IDiffer,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,DiffPlex.IChunker)
member.summary: Gets the inline textual diffs.
member.param: if ignore the white space; otherwise, .

member.name: T:DiffPlex.DiffBuilder.ISideBySideDiffBuilder
member.summary: Provides methods that generate differences between texts for displaying in a side by side view.

member.name: M:DiffPlex.DiffBuilder.ISideBySideDiffBuilder.BuildDiffModel(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a diff model for displaying diffs in a side by side view
member.returns: The side by side diff model

member.name: T:DiffPlex.DiffBuilder.Model.SideBySideDiffModel
member.summary: A model which represents differences between to texts to be shown side by side

member.name: P:DiffPlex.DiffBuilder.SideBySideDiffBuilder.Instance
member.summary: Gets the default singleton instance.

member.name: M:DiffPlex.DiffBuilder.SideBySideDiffBuilder.Diff(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the side-by-side textual diffs.
member.param: if ignore the white space; otherwise, .

member.summary: Gets the side-by-side textual diffs.
member.param: if ignore the white space; otherwise, .

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Differ.Instance
member.summary: Gets the default singleton instance of differ instance.

member.name: M:DiffPlex.Differ.CalculateEditLength(System.Int32[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Finds the middle snake and the minimum length of the edit script comparing string A and B

member.name: T:DiffPlex.IChunker
member.summary: Responsible for how to turn the document into pieces

member.name: M:DiffPlex.IChunker.Chunk(System.String)
member.summary: Divide text into sub-parts

member.name: T:DiffPlex.IDiffer
member.summary: Responsible for generating differences between texts

member.name: M:DiffPlex.IDiffer.CreateDiffs(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,DiffPlex.IChunker)
member.summary: Creates a diff by comparing text line by line.
member.param: If set to will ignore white space when determining if lines are the same.
Determine if the text comparision is case sensitive or not
Component responsible for tokenizing the compared texts
member.returns: A object which details the differences

member.name: T:DiffPlex.IThreeWayDiffer
member.summary: Responsible for generating three-way differences and merges between texts

member.name: M:DiffPlex.IThreeWayDiffer.CreateDiffs(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,DiffPlex.IChunker)
member.summary: Creates a three-way diff by comparing base, old, and new text line by line.
member.param: The old version of the text.
The new version of the text.
If set to will ignore white space when determining if lines are the same.
Determine if the text comparison is case sensitive or not
Component responsible for tokenizing the compared texts
member.returns: A object which details the differences

member.name: M:DiffPlex.IThreeWayDiffer.CreateMerge(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,DiffPlex.IChunker)
member.summary: Creates a three-way merge by comparing base, old, and new text line by line.
member.param: The old version of the text.
The new version of the text.
If set to will ignore white space when determining if lines are the same.
Determine if the text comparison is case sensitive or not
Component responsible for tokenizing the compared texts
member.returns: A object which contains the merged result and conflict information

member.name: T:DiffPlex.Model.DiffBlock
member.summary: A block of consecutive edits from A and/or B

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.DiffBlock.DeleteStartA
member.summary: Position where deletions in A begin

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.DiffBlock.DeleteCountA
member.summary: The number of deletions in A

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.DiffBlock.InsertStartB
member.summary: Position where insertion in B begin

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.DiffBlock.InsertCountB
member.summary: The number of insertions in B

member.name: T:DiffPlex.Model.DiffResult
member.summary: The result of diffing two pieces of text

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.DiffResult.PiecesOld
member.summary: The chunked pieces of the old text

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.DiffResult.PiecesNew
member.summary: The chunked pieces of the new text

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.DiffResult.DiffBlocks
member.summary: A collection of DiffBlocks which details deletions and insertions

member.name: T:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayConflictBlock
member.summary: Represents a conflict block in a three-way merge where automatic resolution was not possible

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayConflictBlock.MergedStart
member.summary: Position in the merged result where this conflict starts

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayConflictBlock.BasePieces
member.summary: The base text pieces for this conflict

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayConflictBlock.OldPieces
member.summary: Old text pieces for this conflict

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayConflictBlock.NewPieces
member.summary: New text pieces for this conflict

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayConflictBlock.OriginalBlock
member.summary: The original three-way diff block that caused this conflict

member.name: T:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayChangeType
member.summary: Represents the type of change in a three-way diff

member.name: F:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayChangeType.Unchanged
member.summary: No change from base in either old or new

member.name: F:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayChangeType.OldOnly
member.summary: Change only in old, new unchanged from base

member.name: F:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayChangeType.NewOnly
member.summary: Change only in new, old unchanged from base

member.name: F:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayChangeType.BothSame
member.summary: Same change in both old and new

member.name: F:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayChangeType.Conflict
member.summary: Different changes in old and new (conflict)

member.name: T:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffBlock
member.summary: A block representing changes in a three-way diff

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffBlock.BaseStart
member.summary: Position where the block starts in base

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffBlock.BaseCount
member.summary: The number of pieces in base for this block

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffBlock.OldStart
member.summary: Position where the block starts in old

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffBlock.OldCount
member.summary: The number of pieces in old for this block

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffBlock.NewStart
member.summary: Position where the block starts in new

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffBlock.NewCount
member.summary: The number of pieces in new for this block

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffBlock.ChangeType
member.summary: The type of change this block represents

member.name: T:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffResult
member.summary: The result of diffing three pieces of text (base, old, new)

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffResult.PiecesBase
member.summary: The chunked pieces of the base text

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffResult.PiecesOld
member.summary: The chunked pieces of the old text

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffResult.PiecesNew
member.summary: The chunked pieces of the new text

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayDiffResult.DiffBlocks
member.summary: A collection of ThreeWayDiffBlocks which details the differences between the three texts

member.name: T:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayMergeResult
member.summary: The result of a three-way merge operation

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayMergeResult.MergedPieces
member.summary: The merged text pieces

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayMergeResult.IsSuccessful
member.summary: Whether the merge was successful without conflicts

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayMergeResult.ConflictBlocks
member.summary: List of conflict blocks that could not be automatically merged

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Model.ThreeWayMergeResult.DiffResult
member.summary: The three-way diff result that was used to create this merge

member.name: T:DiffPlex.Renderer.UnidiffRenderer
member.summary: Renderer for generating unified diff (unidiff) format output from diff results

member.name: P:DiffPlex.Renderer.UnidiffRenderer.Instance
member.summary: Gets the default singleton instance of the unidiff renderer.

member.name: M:DiffPlex.Renderer.UnidiffRenderer.#ctor(DiffPlex.IDiffer,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The differ to use. If null, uses the default Differ.
Number of unchanged context lines to include around changes.

member.name: M:DiffPlex.Renderer.UnidiffRenderer.Generate(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a unified diff format output from two texts.
member.param: The old file name to show in the headers.
The new file name to show in the headers.
member.returns: A string containing the unified diff output.

member.name: M:DiffPlex.Renderer.UnidiffRenderer.Generate(DiffPlex.Model.DiffResult,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a unified diff format output from a diff result.
member.param: The old file name to show in the headers.
The new file name to show in the headers.
member.returns: A string containing the unified diff output.

member.name: M:DiffPlex.Renderer.UnidiffRenderer.GenerateUnidiff(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generate a unified diff format output directly from two texts.
member.param: The old file name to show in the headers.
The new file name to show in the headers.
Number of unchanged context lines to include around changes.
member.returns: A string containing the unified diff output.

member.name: P:DiffPlex.ThreeWayDiffer.Instance
member.summary: Gets the default singleton instance of three-way differ.
